title: Stytch MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Stytch MCP Server for Claude
Configure and manage Stytch authentication services and workspace settings
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Stytch
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `authentication` `stytch` `identity` `security` `auth`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http stytch http://mcp.stytch.dev/mcp && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "stytch": {
    "url": "http://mcp.stytch.dev/mcp",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add --transport http stytch http://mcp.stytch.dev/mcp && claude mcp list

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/stytch-mcp-server
